children.question: What was last year's CUET cutoff?
children.answer: Last year's CUET cutoff scores varied by course. For B.Com (Hons), it was roughly 740+. You can check the detailed course-wise matrix on our portal's admission sheet.

children.question: What documents are required?
children.answer: You will need your Class 10 & 12 Marksheets, CUET Scorecard, Character Certificate, and Category Certificate (SC/ST/OBC/EWS) if applicable.

children.question: Postgraduate Admissions
children.answer: PG admissions are centrally handled via the DU CSAS PG portal. Ensure you have valid CUET-PG credentials to log in and select our college.

children.question: What is the minimum attendance rule?
children.answer: As per University norms, a minimum of 67% attendance is mandatory to be eligible to sit for the end-semester examinations.

children.question: Where can I find the course syllabus?
children.answer: The syllabus for all NEP-based undergraduate courses can be downloaded from the academic section on the official website.

children.question: Is hostel accommodation available?
children.answer: Currently, we do not offer on-campus hostel facilities. However, there are multiple safe PGs and student flats available in the immediate vicinity of the college.
